rows.评论产品的属性: Size=Break X2 with Wireless Microphones and Mic Stand
rows.标题: Great Sound, Great Times, and a Fraction of the Bar Tab
rows.评论:
I was looking for a karaoke machine that would not break the bank, and the Ikarao Break X2 delivered exactly what I needed. My friends and I normally head out to karaoke bars, but after a long week sometimes staying home and saving money is the smarter call. This machine makes that decision an easy one, bringing the full karaoke bar experience right into your living room. At first the price may seem steep, but when you factor in what you would spend on a night out, it pays for itself quickly.

The Ikarao Break X2 comes loaded with built in apps to choose from, though some may require subscriptions depending on the service. What I appreciated most is that it also supports SD cards and common karaoke formats, which is a lifesaver if your internet connection is unreliable or unavailable. The screen is decent for up close viewing, but connecting it to a TV via HDMI is where it really shines and makes reading lyrics effortless. The battery lasts for hours without needing a charge, and the sound quality is impressively powerful even at moderate volume levels.

The version I purchased came with two wireless microphones and a microphone stand, which genuinely elevates the whole experience. There have been occasional moments where the system becomes unresponsive and requires a restart, but nothing that required complex troubleshooting or caused any lasting issues. Overall the performance has been reliable enough that it has not put a damper on any of our get togethers. If you are looking for a fun and affordable way to bring karaoke night home, this machine is well worth considering.

We bought this to sing by and we were impressed! You can download any song to sing by and it comes with two microphones. It‘s has bluetooth reliability and it’s mobility makes it great to take it anywhere you want to go. It’s a cool karaoke machine!

rows.评论产品的属性: Size=Break X2 with Wireless Microphones and Mic Stand
rows.评论: My friends and I had a wonderful time using this karaoke machine. The only issue we had was the tablet itself makes it difficult to type quickly and has a short delay when opening or switching apps. A physical keyboard would be helpful. We did love that we could mirror the lyrics to the television. Without that, we would probably be annoyed at having to use the small screen. The sound quality is good with no feedback from the microphones and excellent volume. Initially, we had it in a karaoke mode, but soon discovered that the reverb was annoying. However once the settings were adjusted, we sang the night away. It is very portable and having the microphones stored within the speaker is very convenient. Would recommend this for any party.

This little karaoke speaker is worth every penny. My wife and I sang songs for 2 1/2 hours, set up was easy, I had an extra hdmi cord and hooked it up to our TV easily. We love the diffent settings, I almost sound like a real singer now. If you are into karaoke get this unit, you are going to have hours of fun🎵

This is a great machine, the mics that charge in the unit are great, and sound quality is awesome. I generally use youtube to pull up my songs but there is an app called Karafun that can be used. My mom wanted one too so I gifted her one. But the only thing is there are not enough instructions. I‘m a push all the buttons and see what they do type of person, but a manual on the functions would really help. They only give you a sheet of paper and hope for the best. But this machine is worth it
Great quality sound. Versatile and easy to use! All in one design with multiple interfaces to other audio or TV etc. We love it.

I’ve used my X2 for a good week now. It is an excellent all-in-one machine if you want something portable and elegant with minimal wiring. I have mine sitting on a 35mm speaker stand. Initially I bought this to feed HDMI output to my Hue 8K Sync Box which can sync my Hue lights to incoming audio as well as output that audio to my surround sound for a truly unique and immersive experience. Unfortunately I found out that the HDMI output from the X2 only transfers video data, and that is by design as unfiltered audio may damage speakers. I ended up using iLightShow app on my phone that can pick up audio from my phone’s mic and sync my Hue lights to that audio; it’s not great with some lag, but it’s passable, and the X2 speaker is plenty loud for the space I have.
Here are some more positives:
- Excellent build quality. It’s hefty in a good way and appears to be built from quality materials. It even looks to be weather resistant with rubber covers covering all jacks and rubber buttons, but I wouldn’t risk it in the rain. The strap looks to be good quality as well although I haven’t used it.
- Setup is quick and intuitive like what you’d expect from a smart tablet. It didn’t even come with a manual, but there is a digital manual on the tablet if you want to check a button’s functionality.
- The swivel tablet is easy to use running a basic and intuitive OS.
- Mics hide out of sight when not in use. This unit is just really sleek. I read people notice there is a slight latency with these Bluetooth mics, but it’s not noticeable to me.
- Along with YouTube and KaraFun that comes with it, it also comes with a Chinese app called 全民K歌 with a ton of Chinese karaoke songs. The app registration costs about $44 for 2 years and you can also pay monthly/quarterly/annually, but it is a bit of a pain to make the payment. You’ll need to pay via WeChat with payment setup.

A couple of negatives that keeps it from perfection IMO:
- Tablet is a bit laggy when compared to a regular tablet especially when you’re typing on that onscreen keyboard. Luckily you can use the mics to speak what you want to search for into the search box.
- The front LEDs on the speaker is not really noticeable even in a dark setting. To me it’s just a gimmick.
- I wish the tablet and the front LEDs would go to “sleep” mode when I “close” the tablet instead of having to turn it off every time.
- Not all 10” screen protectors work with this tablet. Just make sure the one you get is 9.5” x 6” or less if you do get one.
- There is a small button on the mic that doesn’t appear to do anything when I short press it or long press it.
- I believe there are two versions of this machine. The one I got has a USB-C charging port and came with a USB cable, but no wall charger, so you’ll have to get one yourself.

rows.标题: Impressive in every way - look, sound, ease of use and compact sturdy build.
rows.评论:
I was anxious to receive the unit after reading so much about it and watching the videos.
I‘m thoroughly impressed with the look, sturdy professional build, outstanding performance and ease of use. This will be equal parts fun and profitable for me.

Great overall investment!

rows.评论产品的属性: Size=Break X2 with Wireless Microphones and Mic Stand
rows.标题: Machine broke after only four months from purchase date
rows.评论: This is the worst product of all, I purchased this in Oct-2025, only 4 months and the machine is already broken. It won’t turn on, it just died for no reason and it’s very hard to contact customer support!!!
Perfect size and weight! Ease of use and to carry. The best part is the quality of sound! And I love how the microphones are stored.
Perfect size and weight! Ease of use and to carry. The best part is the quality of sound! And I love how the microphones are stored.
Great sound for its size. The full 360 spin on the tablet is so nice to have. No complaints. Works and sounds great for the price.

rows.标题: Best Karaoke machine for your karaoke money!
rows.评论: I actually did a lot of research for choosing this one. I really think this machine offers the best quality that you can get for the money. It is right on the edge of a really good Home machine and a professional one. I actually considered starting a Karaoke small business using this machine!I had a really cheap one before and I decided to treat myself and upgrade when I was asked by a friend to host a fun karaoke party at her house for our mutual friends. The party was a big success, the machine was easy to use and had great sound. I highly recommend it!.

This portable karaoke system is wonderful. The build feels extremely high quality, the microphones store into the unit conveniently and we‘ve used it several times at various family parties. Note that the unit is a little heavy, but that’s what you get with good quality and good battery power. The user interface is a little basic, but once you get accustomed to it, it’s very easy to use.

rows.标题: Ikarao Beat X1 two thumbs way uo!
rows.评论: I still have the Pioneer CLD-V720 Karaoke machine I bought for about $1K setup in my home and will likely still keep it. With that said, I have been waiting to buy a Karaoke machine in this century! :) If you been into Karaoke, Pioneer is the best when it all started, mics, sound and a huge library of music video to choose from. Without a doubt, the Ikarao Beat X1 is the best in the market IMHO currently! It doesn’t have the nice videos like Pioneer Karaoke, but everything is better ie. mics, easy setup, custom sound setup for the mics, portable, inputs for wired mics or plug in your guitar, sound quality, Bluetooth, battery operated and ability to Karaoke offline. Two of my adult kids play the electric guitar, I can‘t wait for them to plug in and play while karaoking. The price point currently at $550 from $700 retail, it is the best valuev model for your money! I’m really impressed with this machine, I am not easily impressed by other Karaoke machines since I have the best Pioneer Karaoke machine that my family still uses, but this one is a solid, well engineered machine. I even bought the travel case, mic and Karaoke stand at Ikarao.com because I expect to use at family events outside wherever we party!

This karaoke machine is fantastic! It is so much fun with great sound quality and many features. The screen size is very nice and it comes with 2 microphones for two people to enjoy at once. I highly recommend it.

We love it. I bought this for Christmas as a family gift we could all share and spend more time together using. What a hit! It feels solid and the sound quality is really good for the size. The mic storage and charging is very convenient. The unit is great for portability and the battery life is really decent. We have had non-stop karaoke for several hours without interruption. There are plenty of IO ports to connect another mic, or connect to a TV and external sound system. If you are looking for a portable, high quality system with great sound, this one is the one for you.

We love it. I bought this for Christmas as a family gift we could all share and spend more time together using. What a hit! It feels solid and the sound quality is really good for the size. The mic storage and charging is very convenient. The unit is great for portability and the battery life is really decent. We have had non-stop karaoke for several hours without interruption. There are plenty of IO ports to connect another mic, or connect to a TV and external sound system. If you are looking for a portable, high quality system with great sound, this one is the one for you.

Packaging was nice, it was packaged in a box with soft foam silhouettes that surround all of the parts. The quality of the screen, mics and box were nice and clean. Setup was very easy, with a wizard to set things up. Connecting to YouTube was easy. The sound was pretty impressive for such a small box. The only thing I didn‘t like about it was that the HDMI interface was video-only. One of the reasons that I bought this particular model was so that I could hook it up to my theater system. The video worked fine, but there was no audio out of the HDMI interface. Very odd, because an HDMI interface as defined as: “An HDMI (High-Definition Multimedia Interface) is a digital interface standard for transmitting high-quality, uncompressed video and compressed or uncompressed audio over a single cable". Anyway, I returned it and am going to look for one with video and audio out of the HDMI. It was pretty disappointing as I really wanted to keep the unit. It was pretty well done for a good price. I only knocked off a star because if it had audio out of the HDMI I would have gave it 5 stars.

Great sound quality and easy to use right out of the box! It was a huge hit with my ten year old granddaughter, and she even let her mom sing along with her 😊 So glad I chose the one with two microphones. Surprisingly portable even for a ten year old.

rows.评论产品的属性: Size=Break X2 with Wireless Microphones and Mic Stand
rows.评论: Can’t wait to use this at a party! We bought this for our boys for Christmas! We’ve been playing with it and even my husband and I got in on the singing! Really good sound and compact enough to take anywhere! If you are wanting a karaoke machine, BUY THIS ONE!!!

The perfect karaoke machine that I have found. It makes karaoke very convenient with the Karafun App. You can pretty much find all kinds of songs from the app, and you can adjust the backup singer and key level. The sound system is phenomenal. You can easily cast the screen to the TV with an HDMI cable.
If you are used to the screen-casting method of karaoke through YouTube, you can still do it. But it is not as convenient because there is no YouTube queue function through the system. You pretty much have to select a song right after singing one if you use YouTube for a better song pool.

Our annual karaoke party was coming, and our regular hired DJ could not make it.  I bought the ikarao break X2 after reading many reviews, not just on Amazon, but in various reviews of karaoke machines.  When I received it, I was a little apprehensive based on its smaller size.  But I underestimated the size when it came to the sound it produced.  It was fantastic...I purchased two additional speakers with stands, and we had a very professional sounding experience.  I added a tv to read the words, and we used the screen on the break X2 to build our cue.  It was easy for anyone to add the songs to the queue, and we had a fantastic evening on the patio.
My family had a blast with this! So happy I got the one with two microphones!
It echoes so I haven’t really used it

rows.标题: Be careful before dropping your money down
rows.评论: You can’t mirror your iPhone to the actual Ikarao screen. With as much money spent I can’t believe the only way I could use YouTube and see lyrics and such is by having internet. You would think this machine would allow you to connect your phone with cable port into the karaoke machine and whatever is seen on your phone could be seen on the screen, but nope.Huge disappointment. If you are expecting to have the option I speak of then think twice before ordering this karaoke machine.
I love this thanks! It’s easy and you can bring it anywhere you go plus the battery life is long
The machine itself is great but it comes with absolutely no instructions on how to use it.
so easy to set up and to use.  We had a ball doing karaoke  Worth the money  sound etc just as explained

This machine is great! We’ve used it for a variety of events. Once you connect to internet, you pretty much have access to any song you want. The microphones are very loud and perfect for outdoors (they can be adjusted if you want it quieter)! We had someone DJ our 4th of July party, which was outside over a large area, and I had no complaints with anything :)

rows.标题: Professional Quality Exceeding even my demanding Audiophile Expectations
rows.评论: I have many bad and good karaoke machines. I have never had them sound as good as a professional grade system until I received this one.  This Karaoke speaker system sounds better than my most expensive audio systems.  And, yes I have Bose,  Sennheiser & Sony.  This is absolutely the best music 100%  I cant believe what a great sounding feature rich product I received at such a reasonable price.  Will always buy this brand name from now on.
So much fun with friends and family. Great customer service also!
Defective
The best machine that I have ever used.  We use at almost every party that we have and the most unlikely people enjoy themselves.
OMG! The best karaoke machine ever! Really good.

rows.评论: Overall, I like it and it works well. I would like to have the tablet portion work more like a regular android tablet to be able to download apps like Spotify or YouTube music instead of having to use to the website. Has a great sound and battery life is great.
I buy this karaoke and is not working the microphones can‘t connect
easy to operate  very very  good sound as well.

For such a small size karaoke machine, this one packs a lot of sound.  The bass is incredible. Top quality and easy to operate.  My friends want to purchase one after they saw this karaoke machine in operation.  Value for the money and microphone quality are superb.
Maravilloso como se escucha

WOW the customer service is great! We received a brand new X1 replacement today.The Ikarao karaoke product works really great, thank you!

I absolutely love this little Karaoke machine! Soooo easy to use, set up was a breeze and we started singing that night! Love that it has its own screen… nice because you don’t have to give up your phone or put your tablet to work. I haven’t tried connecting to my TV, but thinking it’s probably just as easy as it was opening the box. The sound quality is great and the microphone’s clarity is really good. The sound controls make it nice when you need to make some singing sound better. The lighting effects are ok, but that may be because I haven’t completely figured that out quite yet. We have used this as a karaoke machine as well as a speaker. Sound quality is very good, especially packed in such a small speaker. Highly recommend! Great for parties and get togethers!
ikarao‘s customer service is top notch. Damaged our speaker almost a year ago and they provided THE BEST customer service.
Impressed very good sound and mics work amazing.

I just give 4 star coz it‘s good comfortable karaoke but I think they need to improve the processor coz kind of slow tablet...coz right now the generation for table t and phone is they do fast giga hertz if u touch the screen is fast move...I wish nexttime they upgrade the unit make em fast the processor.
Excellent quality product with intuitive user interface and great sound.  Easy to set up and,  with subscription,  has an amazing library ready to go.
It’s super fun for family and friends get together!

This is absolutely a superior product. I have used it extensively at events and people are impressed. However, there was an issue that the aux port and speaker broke and I bought another one. I have not heard from Ikarao but it is such a superior product that getting a refund is not even in the cards. I rave about this product and is the best absolutely.

rows.标题: Bluetooth, the ikarao becomes a speaker only and lyrics will show on ipad.  hdmi-words show on both
rows.评论: Just received that amazing unit!  I just received that and so far it is working well and is living up to high standards.  Great sound, mics are good, Customer Service is amazing-I have had several questions and they have responded within 24 hr!  Absolutely buy again!

The sound quality is top and you can adjust many type of sounds. It is a bit heavy but it is portable to carry anywhere. I like the apps you can use in this machine and we always receive compliment wherever we bring it. Connects well with devices and no problem with the microphones.
I love it
This product sounds great, although it has come with no directions and the packages to go along with it are very expensive, therefore I‘m returning.

rows.标题: Easy setup, great sound, super portable
rows.评论: What a great little machine! We used this outside hooked up to a projector to show the lyrics on a sheet. Later picked it up and hooked it up to the Tv, very seamless. People had a great time adding songs to the queue from KaraFun but we also switched to YouTube to get a few niche selections. Sound was great, lighting was super fun as the sun went down, mics were plenty loud. I do wish the mics didn’t automatically shut off when you put them in the mic holders, but I also understand why they do. Had several people ask where I got this and for how much. Highly recommend.

This little portable karaoke machine is much loved and used at our campground. It‘s so nice not to rely on having a phone always attached to a karaoke machine. We use it for parties at the house also. It has a high volume and it is so nice that Spotify and Karafun are readily available as automatic apps.It‘s easy to use but when I had a question the customer service is phenomenal and response right away. I really like how the screen also moves and even flattens where you can store it; nice and convenient overall. Between the great customer service and how much use we get out of this I highly recommend this machine and it was worth the money.
Claimed to be Spotify worthy. After opening found out they don’t offer Spotify and want the customer to pay and sign up for another service.Very disappointed and returning this singing machine.
This is the best machine I’ve ever used . I would prefer to use this that any professional unit . The sound and balance is superior . And it’s so easy to use
The karaoke machine works well and the sound quality is good
Great karoke machine. Also can stream music. Used it for a party and it was great.
The sound is great.

rows.标题: This Karoake Machine is The BOMB!!!
rows.评论: This machine is the bomb! We have sung our hearts out and laughed so hard!!! Good value with many handy features. 2 Wireless mikes with built in chargers, swiveling screen, free subscription for karaoke songs/words, cool colored lights, massive bass sound and very cool effects on vocals!!! We LOVE IT!!!
Love it
Great All In One Karaoke machine!

rows.标题: Would buy again. Great customer service.
rows.评论: Big sound, compact machine. Customer support is awesome!

This is a great product, but my after sale service after my kiddo dropped the machine from its stand was even better. I skeptically emailed customer service and to my surprise they responded… Long story short, I have my replacement back - best customer service experience I’ve had on an Amazon purchase.
More powerful than I expected
We were thrilled to receive and use this all-in-one machine - clear integrated chargeable wireless mics, working KaraFun system, and loud booming sound.

If you’re use to singing on quality equipment …don’t buy! The delay on this microphone throws you completely off when singing ! You have to come in early all through the song for your voice to match up with the music ! Not good at all
Smaller than expected, however i love it, great sound, works great

I have to write a follow up on this. The merchant reached out to me and trouble shooted the issue and then sent out a replacement mic which charged correctly. I am so amazed by the great service.--original--The concept is awesome but cannot suggest this because I ordered the device and one of the mics did not work it won‘t take a charge so either i received a used broken device or the quality of the product is bad.

Unit works very good , clear sound , mics are great , easy to use  , pretty loud for its size ( its smaller when you physically see it )  one thing the free 6 months of kara fun is a scam , it only does previews , gee thanks  one star off for that bs . But yes good unit
Delay in sound which made singing difficult and much too long for credit after returning!

rows.标题: Must have if your family and friends love karaoke!

I enjoy the karaoke, sound, and mics. I just don’t understand how to download apps for the amount of money it is I should be able to download YouTube instead of using Firefox. Also there are important missing functions like a home button to get back to the main screen. So other than figuring out the work arounds I enjoy it.

My daughter had a going away party with her friends and this was a hit. They really enjoyed themselves and even though it was expensive it was worth it. I later ordered the stands so you can stand and sing instead of sitting down.
Super easy to set up and begin using

rows.标题: Amazing sound, ease of use, and overall quality!
rows.评论: LOVE LOVE LOVE this machine!  I bought this just in time for my birthday. I’ve had so much fun with it so far! The box it came in kept the equipment intact. Easy to setup out of the box, battery life is insane, Bluetooth connectivity is easy, the touchscreen is a very nice touch. Being able to adjust the mic sound is such a plus as well. I bought the one that comes with a stand, and that doesn’t disappoint either. Great quality and the value for what it’s worth is top notch.

Everyone is raving about our new karaoke machine. The sound system is clear, crisp, and excellently crafted that build to last for hours of singing, dancing, and listening.It has a built in Bluetooth capabilities, so we don‘t need to hook up the machine to a phone.We are very happy with our Ikarao machine. It is worth every penny.  Even my bf who is very shy of singing, he is singing now! Who cares about the off-key notes and out of tune voices. We have Ikarao!

rows.标题: Way outperforms it‘s price and is just an amazing product.
rows.评论: I took this on my Philippines trip on a very long set of flights. It was worth it, this thing is amazing quality and definitely made the entire trip more enjoyable.
Great product, fair price!

This karaoke machine is sooo worth it !!! The sound quality is amazing !!!!. It has 2 wireless mics that are great quality !!!Love the attached tablet, you can connect your Spotify and YouTube . Connects to Bluetooth and wifi . Super easy to use . My family and friends really enjoy our karaoke nights .
